item.title: Email Validation
item.author: seilylook
item.description: Configurations Docker Image We use official Airflow image. We have to install the necessary libraries and packages into the Airflow container. For that, we have to create a Dockerfile 1 2 3 4 5 6 FROM apache/airflow:2.10.2 USER airflow COPY requirements.txt /requirements.txt RUN pip install -r /requirements.txt 1 2 3 confluent-kafka cassandra-driver pymongo This Dockerfile will be used to install airflow:2.10.2. Then, it will install all necessary libraries in the requirements.
